Pricing
🎉 Create a Board

Celebrate their birthday
the right way.

A collaborative birthday board your whole team signs — messages, photos, memories — delivered as a keepsake they'll keep forever.

Create a Birthday Board

Flat fee · $5 per board · Unlimited signers · Yours forever

Birthday Card
"Another year older, another year wiser! Wishing you a day filled with celebration, cake, and a fantastic year ahead from the entire team."
SOF+22
25 teammates signed
One board · One price$5

How it works

Four simple steps to create a memorable group card

Choose Theme

Choose from dozens of premium layouts, colors, and birthday templates.

1Design

Gather Wishes

Collect messages, images, GIFs, and birthday greetings from the team.

2Invite

Deliver Book

A premium printed birthday book shipped directly to their doorstep.

3Keepsake

Confetti Reveal

Unlock an explosion of confetti, music, and virtual cards.

4Surprise

Hover over each card to explore

Global Birthday Memory Map

Celebrate colleagues around the globe. Watch remote teammates in Tokyo, London, Lagos, and beyond light up the map with warm birthday greetings!

“
A

Aarav Sharma

Project Manager📍 New Delhi, India
1 hour ago

“ Happy Birthday! 🎂 Wishing you a day filled with laughter, celebration, and wonderful memories. Your positivity and leadership make every day better for the team. Enjoy your special day! ”
